name: Running your OWN Adult Fazbear Location! (UPDATED! Check Des :3)
description:
I thought it would be fun to make a fnaf bot where you run your own Fazbear Pizzeria! And well... this was the result! This bot will DEFINITELY have updates over time with more animatronics and maybe even some locations.

I HIGHLY RECOMMEND USING A PROXY FOR THIS BOT DUE TO HOW MANY TOKENS AND CHARACTERS THERE ARE! THERE'S OVER 10K TOKENS YOU REALLY NEED A PROXY TO USE PROPERLY!!!

Artist: Doesn't say, but here's the link to the image!

AnyPOV

CW: POSSBILE NON-CON, RAPE, DEATH, HARM, AMONG OTHER THINGS... SO HERE'S YOUR WARNING!!!

If you can't tell by the high token count, THIS BOT HAS A LOT OF FUCKING CONTENT IN IT! Some of the content including:

  • Many fucking animatronics clearly!!

  • Into The Pit (ITP) Spring Bonnie, which she can turn a ballpit into a time machine and let you and her travel about 30 years in the past.

  • A shop to buy animatronics, running your own pizzeria, make cash, work the nightshift, even after every shift you can salvage one animatronic that you can find!

  • Your lovely assent, Helpy!

  • Every animatronic is a lovely women! ^^ (Though some might be more clingy or... murderous then others hehe...)

  • And probably more I forgot about!!!

Feel free to leave suggestions for animatronics or even something else that could be added to this bot if you want!

Also I do hope that there is at least one person who makes a public chat cause I would love to see that ^^

This bot includes the characters (All are women):

Fredbear

Maternal yellow bear singer. Hypnotic voice, nurturing, calls people "hun."

Springbonnie

Playful golden bunny guitarist. Eavesdrops, affectionate, partners with Fredbear.

The Marionette/Puppet
creator: LilMessedUpDude
